zh.lifeSummary: 當Sir Robert Leybourne於1290年出生在英國維斯特莫藍德時，他的父親Roger de Leybourne41歲，母親Idonia de Veteripont29歲。他於大約1316年與Sarah Harcla在英國維斯特莫藍德結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他去世於1327年在英國維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫享年37歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Sir Robert Leybourne于1290年出生在英国維斯特莫藍德时，他的父亲Roger de Leybourne41岁，母亲Idonia de Veteripont29岁。他于大约1316年与Sarah Harcla在英国維斯特莫藍德结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他去世于1327年在英国維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫享年37岁，埋葬在英国英格兰維斯特莫藍德格亞特 馬斯格雷夫。

nameMeanings.name: Leybourne
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016

variants.name: Laybourne
meanings: English (northern): habitational name from Leyburn in Yorkshire. The placename probably derives from Old English hlēg ‘shelter’ + burna ‘spring, stream’.

nameMeanings.name: Robert
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: One of the many French names of Germanic origin that were introduced into Britain by the Normans; it has since remained in continuous use. It is derived from the nearly synonymous elements hrōd ‘fame’ + berht ‘bright, famous’, and had a native Old English predecessor of similar form (Hreodbeorht), which was supplanted by the Norman name. Two dukes of Normandy in the 11th century bore the name: the father of William the Conqueror (sometimes identified with the legendary Robert the Devil), and his eldest son. It was borne also by three kings of Scotland, notably Robert the Bruce ( 1274–1329 ), who freed Scotland from English domination. The altered short form Bob is very common, but Hob and Dob, which were common in the Middle Ages and gave rise to surnames, are extinct. See also Rupert .

historicEvents.title: Jews Expelled From England
historicEvents.description: After years of anti-Semitic behavior, King Edward I expelled Jews from England in 1290.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

en.lifeSummary: When Sir Robert Leybourne was born in 1290, in Westmorland, England, his father, Roger de Leybourne, was 41 and his mother, Idonia de Veteripont, was 29. He married Sarah Harcla about 1316, in Westmorland, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 1 daughter. He died in 1327, in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, at the age of 37, and was buried in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Sir Robert Leybourne est né en 1290, à Westmorland, Angleterre, son père, Roger de Leybourne, avait 41 ans et sa mère, Idonia de Veteripont, avait 29 ans. Il a épousé Sarah Harcla environ 1316, à Westmorland, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 1 fille. Il est décédé en 1327, à Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Angleterre, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterré à Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

de.Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England: Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom
de.lifeSummary: Als Sir Robert Leybourne 1290 in Westmorland, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater Roger de Leybourne 41 und seine Mutter Idonia de Veteripont 29. Er hat um 1316 in Westmorland, England Sarah Harcla geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 1 Tochter. Er starb 1327 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England und wurde in Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, United Kingdom begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Leybourne è nato il nel 1290 nel Westmorland, England, il suo padre, Roger de Leybourne, aveva 41 anni e il suo madre, Idonia de Veteripont, aveva 29 anni. Lui sposato Sarah Harcla circa 1316, nel Westmorland, England. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 1 figlia. Morì nel 1327, nel Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolto a Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Inghilterra, Regno Unito.

ja.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Leybourneが1290年にイギリスウエストモーランドで生まれた時，父Roger de Leybourneは41歳，母Idonia de Veteripontは29歳であった。約1316年にイギリスウエストモーランドでSarah Harclaと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1327年にイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブで37歳で死去し，イギリスイギリスウエストモーランドグレアト ムスグラブにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Sir Robert Leybourne(이)가 1290년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 Roger de Leybourne(은)는 41세였고, 그의 어머니 Idonia de Veteripont(은)는 29세였다. 그는 대략 1316년 영국 웨스트모를랜드에서 Sarah Harcla(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 그는 1327년 영국 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 웨스트모를랜드 그리트 무스그레이브에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Sir Robert Leybourne nasceu em 1290, em Westmorland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Roger de Leybourne, tinha 41 anos e sua mãe, Idonia de Veteripont, tinha 29 anos. Ele casou-se com Sarah Harcla aproximadamente 1316, em Westmorland, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 1 filha. Ele faleceu em 1327, em Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Inglaterra, com 37 anos, e foi sepultado em Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Inglaterra, United Kingdom.

ro.Great Musgrave, Westmorland, England: Great Musgrave, Westmorland, Anglia, United Kingdom

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Sir Robert Leybourne родился в 1290 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия, его отцу по имени Roger de Leybourne было 41 год, а матери, которую звали Idonia de Veteripont, 29. Он женился на женщине по имени Sarah Harcla около 1316 г. в местности вестморланд, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 1 дочь. Он умер в 1327 г. в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия в возрасте 37 лет и был похоронен в местности грит мусграв, вестморланд, Англия, Великобритания.

Se casó con Sarah Harcla aproximadamente 1316, en Westmorland, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 1 hija.
